title: Pediatric Anemia CDSS Dangerous-Miss Hazard-to-Control Release-Dependency Manifest
$comment: arc-clinical-council-adoption-v1 P4-T2 / AC P4.1. Binds each of the ten DM-CBC-001..DM-WORKFLOW-010 hazards (validation_plan.md catalog, converted to executable synthetic scenarios by P4-T1 under tests/fixtures/dangerous-miss/) to its rule/control id(s), required test(s), candidate/profile version, evidence, owner, and blocked release gate(s). AUTHORED != EXECUTED (plan hard constraint 4): controlBinding/requiredTests/versionBinding/ownerBinding are AUTHORED facts about what exists and who is accountable; evidence.technicalExecution and evidence.clinicalAdjudication are kept as separate fields precisely so a green `npm run check` (repository-level, synthetic, technical) can never be silently read as clinical adjudication or owner decision (plan hard constraint 3: BUILD STATE CANNOT SATISFY STUDY STATE). NO UNOWNED GAP: a hazard with no implemented control is not a blank cell — it is a `finding` (non-null, owned, blocking) enforced structurally via this schema's per-row if/then, not by convention.

catalogSource.description: Locator into the normative DM-CBC-001..DM-WORKFLOW-010 catalog this manifest binds (validation_plan.md). This manifest does not redefine or re-derive the catalog; it references it.

releaseState.description: Verbatim state taxonomy from arc-clinical-council-adoption-v1.md section 2.

releaseGateOwnerRole.description: Owner-role vocabulary reused verbatim from the plan's decisions-block risk-register owners and section 6 owner-held list (never a named individual).

reviewerRole.description: The eight ARC council reviewer seats, reused verbatim from the P4-T1 fixtures' owner.role values.

fixtureDigest.description: Content digest of the P4-T1 fixture file this row binds to. Test lane recomputes and compares — a stale digest is the rollback signal.

scenarioRef.description: Pointer into the P4-T1 authored scenario specification. This row does not duplicate fixture content — only enough to bind and detect drift.

controlIds.description: Rule ids (from modules/anemia/rules.json) or applicability blocker codes (from scripts/lib/local-applicability.mjs) that mitigate this hazard. Empty only when status is no_control_exists.

versionBinding.description: The 'candidate version it is bound to' link. Exactly one of candidateBinding/profileBinding is populated, matching bindingType; both are null when bindingType is none_available (no_control_exists rows).

testMarkers.description: Distinctive literal substrings of real node:test test title strings in testFile. The test lane greps testFile's source for each marker so a renamed/deleted required test breaks this binding loudly rather than silently.

coverageKind.description: behavioral_positive_and_negative: the test actually exercises hazard mitigation (positive + negative case). honesty_absence_of_coverage: the test only proves the fixture honestly declares no engine exists — it is NOT hazard mitigation coverage.

referenceLocator.description: Reference-only pointer into an owner-held authoritative system (OQ-6). Never the underlying decision content.

status.description: repository_test_executed is a technical/synthetic fact only (V2-class evidence at best per docs/clinical/v3-diagnostic-accuracy-contract.md section 0) — it is never clinical adjudication or owner approval.

OWNER-HELD (OQ-6). This repository never sets adjudicated on its own authority — the value must reflect the referenced external system, never a locally synthesized conclusion (plan hard constraint 2).

evidence.description: AUTHORED vs EXECUTED separation (plan hard constraint 4): technicalExecution is a distinct, narrower, repository-scoped fact from clinicalAdjudication. Neither upgrades the other.

name.description: Never a named individual (OQ-2 is owner-held).

preconditionForHazardIds.description: Other hazardId(s) whose own mitigation has no practical effect until this finding is resolved (P4-V1 R8: a PRECONDITION DEPENDENCY, not a sibling-scope gap of equal weight). Empty unless this finding is a precondition for other hazards' alerts/controls actually being seen or acted upon.

finding.description: An unowned hazard, a repository-only control, or a partial-coverage gap is a FINDING, not a blank cell. This single shape is reused verbatim by the top-level per-row `finding`, `productIntegration.finding`, and `coverageFinding` so the NO UNOWNED GAP / R1 / R2 disclosures share one structural contract.

status.description: Whether this row's control is actually reachable through the shipped product's real input surface, or is repository-only (tested in isolation but no production caller wires it in), or not applicable because no control exists at all (mirrors controlBinding.status).

productCallers.description: Live-verified production call sites (file + call path) that reach this row's control. Non-empty only when status is reachable_in_shipped_product.

inputSurfaceSupported.description: Whether the shipped app's real input surface (schemas/patient-input.schema.json) can carry the field(s) this row's control keys off.

productIntegration.description: P4-V1 R1 [CRITICAL, found independently by lab-medicine and general-pediatrics]: control_bound must never again be silently readable as 'protects the deployed app'. Required on every row, structurally enforced like NO UNOWNED GAP: reachable_in_shipped_product forces >=1 productCaller, inputSurfaceSupported true, and no finding; repository_only_not_reachable_by_deployed_app forces zero productCallers, inputSurfaceSupported false, and a non-null owned blocking finding; not_applicable_no_control_exists (the two no_control_exists hazards) forces zero productCallers, inputSurfaceSupported false, and no finding (the gap is already owned by the row's top-level finding).

coverageFinding.description: P4-V1 R2 [CRITICAL, hematology]: schema-shape-identical to `finding`. Discloses a control_bound row whose engine control covers its own fixture's scenario but leaves a more dangerous branch of the same hazard family uncovered. REQUIRED (non-null when the gap is disclosed, null otherwise) — never omitted, so a future partial-coverage gap cannot be left silently undeclared.

hazardControlBinding.description: NO UNOWNED GAP, enforced structurally: no_control_exists forces a non-null, owned, blocking finding; control_bound forces at least one control id and forbids a finding.

hazardsReachableInShippedProduct.description: P4-V1 C1 [MEDIUM]: aggregate sibling to hazardsWithControl, one layer up. Count of rows whose productIntegration.status is reachable_in_shipped_product. A row can be control_bound (counted in hazardsWithControl) yet NOT reachable in the shipped product (see productIntegration) -- this field exists precisely so a reader of the aggregate alone (without opening every row) cannot re-derive the same '8 of 10 protect the product' misreading that hazardsWithControl alone invites.

hazardsRepositoryOnly.description: P4-V1 C1 [MEDIUM]: count of rows whose productIntegration.status is repository_only_not_reachable_by_deployed_app -- control_bound and repository-test-executed, but not reachable through the shipped app's real input surface. hazardsReachableInShippedProduct + hazardsRepositoryOnly + count(not_applicable_no_control_exists) always equals totalHazards.

clinicalValidationComplete.description: STRUCTURAL GUARD mirroring docs/clinical/v3-diagnostic-accuracy-contract.md's v3DependencyChain.clinicalValidationComplete. No evaluator exists in this repository that can flip this to true.

credentialedReviewComplete.description: STRUCTURAL GUARD. No credentialed human approval has been attached to any hazard in this matrix (P2/P5 not yet executed).

releaseDependencyManifest.description: The release-dependency manifest named in AC P4.1's target_surfaces: the composed, machine-checkable aggregate of the ten rows above.
